{"analysis":"Character n-grams are too slow. Need a different approach. My best results: 0.58 without char n-grams, 0.603 with autotune. Let me try: 1) Use train_full.txt that already exists. 2) Train with dim=200, epoch=25, wordNgrams=2. 3) This should complete in ~15 minutes and hopefully push past 0.62 with the larger embedding space.","plan":"Run a single focused training with larger dim

=200 and 25 epochs. No char n-grams for speed.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"cat > /app/single.py << 'PYEOF'
import fasttext
import os

print('Training dim=200 ep=25...', flush=True)
m = fasttext.train_supervised(
    input='/app/train_full.txt', lr=0.5, epoch=25, wordNgrams=2,
    dim=200, loss='softmax', bucket=2000000, minCount=1, thread=4, verbose=2
)
n, p, r

= m.test('/app/test.txt')
print(f'\nAcc: {p:.4f}', flush=True)

m.save_model('/app/model_best.bin')
sz = os.path.getsize('/app/model_best.bin') / (1024*1024)
print(f'Size: {sz:.1f} MB', flush=True)

if sz > 150:
    print('Quantizing...', flush=True)
    m.quantize(input='/app/train_full.txt', retrain=True, epoch=10, lr=0.25, thread=4, dsub=2, qnorm=True)
    m.save_model('/app/model.bin')
    sz2 = os.path.getsize('/app/model.bin') / (1024*1024)
    n,

p, r = m.test('/app/test.txt')
    print(f'Quant: sz={sz2:.1f}MB acc={p:.4f}', flush=True)
else:
    os.rename('/app/model_best.bin', '/app/model.bin')
    print(f'Saved /app/model.bin ({sz:.1f} MB)', flush=True)

print('DONE', flush=True)
PYEOF

Let me try: 1) Use train_full.txt that already exists. 2) Train with dim=200, epoch=25, wordNgrams=2. 3) This should complete in ~15 minutes and hopefully push past 0.62 with the larger embedding space.","plan":"Run a single focused training with larger dim=200 and 25 epochs. No char n-grams for speed.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"cat > /app/single.py << 'PYEOF'
import fasttext
import os

print('Training dim=200 ep=25...', flush=True)
m = fasttext.train_supervised(
    input='/app/train_full.txt', lr=0.5, epoch=25, wordNgrams=2,
    dim=200, loss='softmax', bucket=2000000, minCount=1, thread=4, verbose=2
)
n, p, r = m.test('/app/test.txt')
print(f'\nAcc: {p:.4f}', flush=True)

m.save_model('/app/model_best.bin')
sz = os.path.getsize('/app/model_best.bin') / (1024*1024)
print(f'Size: {sz:.1f} MB', flush=True)

if sz > 150:
    print('Quantizing...', flush=True)
    m.quantize(input='/app/train_full.txt', retrain=True, epoch=10, lr=0.25, thread=4, dsub=2, qnorm=True)
    m.save_model('/app/model.bin')
    sz2 = os.path.getsize('/app/model.bin') / (1024*1024)
    n, p, r = m.test('/app/test.txt')
    print(f'Quant: sz={sz2:.1f}MB acc={p:.4f}', flush=True)
else:
    os.rename('/app/model_best.bin', '/app/model.bin')
    print(f'Saved /app/model.bin ({sz:.1f} MB)', flush=True)

print('DONE', flush=True)
